name: workflowmax
description: Reads and writes WorkflowMax jobs, clients, and client contacts through the real WorkflowMax API v2 (api.workflowmax2.com/v2).

risk.read: external WorkflowMax API v2 read of job, client, and client-contact data
risk.write: external mutation of WorkflowMax jobs, clients, and client contacts (create/update/delete); approval required
risk.approval: writes require approval; reads are none
